questions.text: Your father's mother is your ____.
questions.explanation: Your father's mother is your grandmother (dadi).

questions.text: How many hands do you have?
questions.explanation: We have two hands.

questions.text: We hear sounds with our ____.
questions.explanation: We hear with our ears.

questions.text: A family can have parents, children and grandparents.
questions.explanation: Yes, a family includes parents, children, grandparents and more. True.

questions.text: We use our ____ to smell.
questions.explanation: We smell with our nose.

questions.text: Which part helps us to walk?
questions.explanation: We use our legs to walk.

questions.text: We taste food with our ____.
questions.explanation: We taste with our tongue.

questions.text: We should brush our teeth every day.
questions.explanation: Brushing daily keeps teeth clean and healthy. True.

questions.text: Which part of the plant is under the ground?
questions.explanation: Roots grow under the ground and hold the plant.

questions.text: Plants make their food using ____.
questions.explanation: Plants make food using sunlight, water and air.

questions.text: The green part of a plant is the ____.
questions.explanation: Leaves are green and make food for the plant.

questions.text: Plants need water to grow.
questions.explanation: Plants need water, air and sunlight to grow. True.

questions.text: Which animal gives us milk?
questions.explanation: A cow gives us milk.

questions.text: Which animal lives in water?
questions.explanation: A fish lives in water.

questions.text: A ____ gives us eggs.
questions.explanation: A hen gives us eggs.

questions.text: A dog has four legs.
questions.explanation: A dog has four legs. True.

questions.text: Which of these is a healthy food?
questions.explanation: Fruits are healthy and give us vitamins.

questions.text: Milk comes from a ____.
questions.explanation: We get milk from a cow.

questions.text: We should wash ____ before eating fruits.
questions.explanation: We must wash our hands before eating to stay clean.

questions.text: Eating too much junk food is good for health.
questions.explanation: Too much junk food is bad for health. So this is False.

questions.text: We should not ____ water.
questions.explanation: We should save water and not waste it.

questions.text: Which of these do we drink?
questions.explanation: We drink clean water to stay healthy.

questions.text: We get water from rivers, wells and ____.
questions.explanation: Rain is an important source of water.

questions.text: We should close the tap when not using water.
questions.explanation: Closing the tap saves water. True.

questions.text: We breathe in ____ to live.
questions.explanation: We breathe air (oxygen) to live.

questions.text: On a rainy day we use an ____.
questions.explanation: We use an umbrella to stay dry in rain.

questions.text: In summer the weather is very ____.
questions.explanation: Summer is hot.

questions.text: We can see air with our eyes.
questions.explanation: Air is all around but we cannot see it. So this is False.

questions.text: Which one flies in the sky?
questions.explanation: An aeroplane flies in the sky.

questions.text: A boat travels on ____.
questions.explanation: A boat travels on water.

questions.text: A train runs on ____.
questions.explanation: A train runs on railway tracks.

questions.text: A bicycle has two wheels.
questions.explanation: A bicycle (cycle) has two wheels. True.

questions.text: Which festival is called the festival of lights?
questions.explanation: Diwali is the festival of lights.

questions.text: On Holi we play with ____.
questions.explanation: Holi is the festival of colours; we play with colours and water.

questions.text: We should throw garbage in a dustbin.
questions.explanation: Throwing garbage in a dustbin keeps our surroundings clean. True.

questions.text: Which one keeps our surroundings clean?
questions.explanation: Planting trees keeps the environment clean and green.

questions.text: Trees give us oxygen and shade.
questions.explanation: Trees give oxygen, shade and fruits. True.
